purpose: single fixture that binds the pull handoff, push protocol, and test topology

pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

pull_handoff.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_handoff.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance
pull_handoff.push_preflight: binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity and a short-lived push session
pull_handoff.push_snapshot_hashes: lists the live remote comparison set for planning only and never acts as a lock
pull_handoff.push_plan_dry_run: uploads the canonical plan as eligibility evidence and returns a receipt without mutating target resources
pull_handoff.push_batch_apply: revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
pull_handoff.push_journal: reads durable claim, lease, fencing, and recovery evidence without granting write authority
pull_handoff.push_recover inspect: starts with inspect and classifies finish, rollback, retry, or block before any mutating repair
pull_handoff.push_recover auto|finish|rollback: mutates only when the journal row, lease fence, and fresh live hashes prove the action
pull_handoff.push_recover: starts with inspect, then finishes, rolls back, or blocks only when journal evidence plus fresh live hashes prove the action

push_guards.preflight: binds the pull base to one remote identity, one requested scope, and one short-lived push session
push_guards.snapshot_listing: returns live remote hash evidence for planning and never upgrades into write authority
push_guards.dry_run_receipt: proves eligibility only and cannot be reused as a liveness lock
push_guards.apply_revalidation: refreshes live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
push_guards.journal_inspect: reads durable claim and fencing evidence without mutating target resources
push_guards.recovery_inspect: must happen before any mutating recovery mode and may block when finish or rollback cannot be proven safe

production_shape.preflight_session_binding: a short-lived session bound to the persisted pull base and live remote identity
production_shape.remote_snapshot_hash_listing: a cursorable live remote hash listing used only for planning
production_shape.dry_run_plan_upload: a canonical plan upload that yields a receipt but never a lock
production_shape.mutation_batch_apply: a batched write path that revalidates live state before every batch and at the storage boundary
production_shape.journal_inspect: a read-only evidence read that resolves ambiguity without authorizing a write
production_shape.recovery: inspect-first recovery that mutates only when fresh live hashes and journal evidence prove the action

proof: remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity at different times
push preflight binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity
push dry-run returns a receipt, not a lock
push batch apply revalidates live evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary
push journal remains read-only before mutating recovery
push recovery inspect happens before any mutating repair
browser-visible inspection goes through the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress
remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity at different times
push preflight binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity
push dry-run returns a receipt, not a lock
push batch apply revalidates live evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary
push journal remains read-only before mutating recovery
push recovery inspect happens before any mutating repair
browser-visible inspection goes through the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress

roles.remote_base: the one remote source site that seeds the persisted pull base
roles.local_edited: the one imported local site with user edits
roles.remote_changed: the same remote site observed later after independent drift
roles.runner: the only process allowed to compare, upload, inspect, and recover

push_pipeline.preflight: binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity and a short-lived push session
push_pipeline.snapshot_hash_listing: returns the live remote comparison set for planning only
push_pipeline.dry_run_plan_upload: uploads the canonical plan as eligibility evidence and returns a receipt, not a lock
push_pipeline.mutation_batch_apply: revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
push_pipeline.journal_inspect: reads durable evidence without authorizing mutation
push_pipeline.recovery: starts with inspect and allows mutating repair only when the journal and live hashes prove the action

topology_matrix.remote_snapshot_hash_listing: cursorable live hash evidence used for planning only and never treated as write authority

proofs.auth: push-auth-headers.json keeps read-only inspection on the existing HMAC family and requires push session, idempotency, and canonical push signature for dry-run, apply, and mutating recovery
proofs.auth_session_journal: push-auth-session-journal-proof.json binds push-scoped auth, session minting, journal rows, lease fencing, and inspect-first recovery
proofs.session_journal: push-session-journal-proof.json binds the minted push session to the journal claim, lease fence, and inspect-first recovery path
proofs.recovery_decision: push-recovery-decision.json keeps inspect read-only and requires fresh live hashes before finish, rollback, or auto
proofs.recovery_path: push-recovery-path.json classifies the ambiguous apply outcomes as old, new, blocked, or open
proofs.journal_rows: push-journal-open-response.json exposes claim generation, lease expiry, before/staged/after hashes, and storage guards for restart classification

required_invariants: dry-run and apply are separate remote operations
remote snapshot hash listing is planning evidence, not write authority
dry-run is a receipt, not a lock
apply must revalidate the live remote before every batch and at the storage boundary
journal inspection is read-only and never authorizes mutation by itself
recovery must begin with inspect before any mutating repair
authentication must be at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
pull exporter/importer establish the immutable base package before push
push preflight binds that immutable package to one live remote identity and one short-lived session
push dry-run and push apply stay separate even when the dry-run receipt is still valid
push recovery inspect is read-only and must happen before any mutating recovery mode
